steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A (‘$7$’) is $7$, which satisfies the equation: $3(7)+5(7+4)=21+55=76$. Choice B (‘$8$’) would make the left side too large, choice C (‘$56$’) is the intermediate value $56$, and choice D (‘$72$’) comes from treating $x+4=76$ as the whole equation.
